{ "name": "goober-should-forward-prop", "amdName": "gooberForwardProp", "version": "0.0.1", "description": "The shouldForwardProp addon function for goober", "sideEffects": false, "main": "./dist/goober-should-forward-prop.cjs", "module": "./dist/goober-should-forward-prop.esm.js", "umd:main": "./dist/goober-should-forward-prop.umd.js", "source": "./src/index.js", "unpkg": "./dist/goober-should-forward-prop.umd.js", "types": "./should-forward-prop.d.ts", "type": "module", "scripts": { "build": "rm -rf dist && microbundle --entry src/index.js --name gooberForwardProp --no-sourcemap --generateTypes false", "test": "jest --setupFiles ./jest.setup.js" }, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "https://github.com/cristianbote/goober.git", "directory": "should-forward-prop" }, "author": "Jonas De Vrient <devrient.jonas@gmail.com>", "keywords": [ "goober", "styled", "should-forward-prop" ], "license": "MIT", "peerDependencies": { "goober": "^2.0.18" }, "devDependencies": { "microbundle": "^0.14.2", "jest": "^24.1.0", "preact": "^10.5.6", "@babel/plugin-transform-react-jsx": "^7.7.0", "@babel/preset-env": "^7.3.1", "babel-jest": "^24.1.0" } }
